ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) for inventory management */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was released */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product this specification belongs to */,
  "spec_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification (e.g., Battery Life) */,
  "option_a" TEXT /* Option A for the specification */,
  "option_b" TEXT /* Option B for the specification */,
  "option_c" TEXT /* Option C for the specification */,
  "option_d" TEXT /* Option D for the specification */,
  "option_e" TEXT /* Option E for the specification */,
  "option_f" TEXT /* Option F for the specification */,
  "option_g" TEXT /* Option G for the specification */,
  "option_h" TEXT /* Option H for the specification */,
  "spec_type" TEXT /* Type of specification (e.g., Performance, Display, Battery) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being tracked */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity in stock for the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which to reorder the product */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product whose price is being recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the recorded date */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the price was updated */,
  "old_price" REAL /* Old price before the update */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the product (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_logs" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comparison */,
  "product_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first product in the comparison */,
  "product_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second product in the comparison */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., side-by-side, feature-by-feature) */,
  "comparison_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments made during the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_logs_product_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("product_id_1") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_logs_product_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("product_id_2") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the product image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., main, thumbnail) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
